reference_transcript: Haan, main Koramangala mein rehti hoon
Mera ghar Indiranagar ke paas hai
Main abhi Whitefield side pe hoon
Main Electronic City mein kaam karti hoon
Haanji, Marathahalli ke paas utar dijiye
Main Jayanagar side se bol rahi hoon
Naanu Rajajinagar alli iddini
Hebbal ke near mera location hai
Main Yelahanka mein rehti hoon
Banashankari se bol rahi hoon
Mera address HSR Layout mein hai
BTM Layout ke side pe ghar hai
Main Majestic pahunch gayi hoon
Silk Board ke paas bahut traffic hai
Bellandur mein mera room hai
Main Sarjapur road pe hoon
Bommanahalli ke aas paas rehti hoon
KR Puram side mera ghar hai
Naanu Peenya inda mathadta iddini
Yeshwanthpur ke paas utarna hai
